column3: (A flower...)%BOX%(Professor Magistra taught us about these, but we still wonder how they grow.)%BOX%(We know that they need heat and earth, but how do they do it?)%BOX%(There must be something we don't know - maybe there's something in the earth that causes them to grow?)%BOX%...%BOX%(We know that our curiosity is evil, that the University holds all knowledge
column4: still, we sometimes have doubt.)%BOX%(A few weeks ago our friend Dex was sick. Hero Curius said they would die, and of course we believed our Hero, as they hold all medical knowledge
column5: yet our friend still lives, apparently in good health.)%BOX%(If we could be so wrong about our friend's health, perhaps our knowledge of plants is wrong as well...)%BOX%

column3: Terry! Come on! We have to get back to work!
